remarks: Bathed in natural light, this well-maintained contemporary residence offers the perfect blend of comfort, sophistication, and convenience. Designed for today's lifestyle, the inviting floor plan features a spacious living room with soaring light and a large fireplace-an ideal setting for both relaxing evenings and entertaining guests. The well-appointed kitchen flows seamlessly into the dining area, and a versatile den/office and a full bath complete the main level, providing flexibility for work, guests, or everyday living. Upstairs, you'll find two generously sized bedrooms and an additional full bath, creating comfortable accommodations with plenty of privacy. Upstairs only has air conditioning units. Further, this home features a wrap-around deck which opens onto a beautiful, level one-acre property. The expansive yard offers abundant space for outdoor entertaining, recreation, gardening, or simply enjoying the peaceful surroundings. Ideally located just minutes from Greens Farms Train Station, award-winning schools, beaches, shopping, dining, and major commuting routes, this home combines a tranquil setting with exceptional convenience. A wonderful opportunity to enjoy comfortable contemporary living in one of Westport's most desirable locations...Offers to rent will be reviewed and accepted after viewing of the property.
